title: Backend Developer Vacancy at CGI India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at CGI India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at CGI India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Delhi-based team.

About CGI India:
CGI India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CGI India!
